chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-849 of 2021 ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date Order with signature of Judge ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------- For hearing of main case 20.08.2021 Petitioner present in person. Mr. Waleed Khanzada, advocate for KW&SB. ------ Counsel for KW&SB states that there is low pressure in the waterline and more over the lines are damaged, however, he undertakes that within 15 days’ time not only lines would be repaired but pressures would also be increased. The petitioner appearing in person is satisfied with the statement given by the counsel for KW&SB and does not press the instant petition any further. The instant petition stands disposed of as not pressed, along with the pending applications, if any. Judge Judge
